Item: Future nominal PED/FED rates by scenario
Why needed: Converts PED litres to nominal revenue and affects retail petrol-price scenarios.
Recommended resolution: Add explicit nominal rate paths to reviewed scenario workbooks or a governed rate table; keep Crown top-up separate.

Item: Future nominal effective Light/Heavy RUC rates
Why needed: Converts net km into revenue; Heavy RUC is class-mix weighted.
Recommended resolution: Provide scenario/year effective average rate paths with source and class-mix assumptions.

Item: PED bridge source history and re-estimation
Why needed: The current app pack reports ped_bridge_source_history_missing.
Recommended resolution: Use accrual PED revenue/base-rate history from 2008Q3 onward; replay Table 3.3 and re-estimate on current data with rolling validation.

Item: Pass-through policy for LPG, CNG, FED refunds, MVR and TUC
Why needed: Only PED/Light/Heavy RUC are directly modeled; Total NLTF requires the other lines.
Recommended resolution: Use an explicit MOT release path where available; otherwise use a governed assumption with status and source.

Why needed: The workbook scales modeled RUC components to the official net-of-admin/refunds basis.
Recommended resolution: Store gross, admin, refunds and net as separate canonical series and calculate the selected basis explicitly.

Why needed: Temporary relief changes benchmark actuals and total comparisons.
Recommended resolution: Keep an Include/Exclude control and persist the choice in the run manifest.

Why needed: Econometric performance is validated to 12 quarters while the workbook projects to 2050.
Recommended resolution: Label H1–H12 backtest-supported and H13+ long-range extrapolation/assumption.
